topics.topic: Define basic electrical terms such as Voltage, Current, Resistance, Power and Energy
State Ohm's Law and the Power Law
Distinguish between Alternating Current (AC) and Direct Current (DC) electricity
Explain the concept of electric shock, arc flash and arc blast hazards
Describe the physiological effects of electric current on the human body, including burns and fibrillation
List common causes of electrical accidents, including unsafe equipment and human error
Understand the dangers of electrical fires and explosions. 2. Electrical Safety Regulations and Standards

Explain the purpose and critical importance of Lockout/Tagout (LOTO) procedures
Describe the six-step LOTO procedure for effective energy control
